author: Jdthomas24
releaseNotes: 2.3.3 WARNING: First Time install. Proceed as usual. Currenrt user: If you have not done so already - Delete the old app from HPM first, Go back to main page of HPM > Click unistall > Click Battery Monitor 2.0 > Click Next. After: Install fresh Battery Monitor 2.0 app via HPM using the search function. This will ensure your historical data will be accurate goign forward.
description: Advanced Hubitat battery monitoring with analytics, trends, and replacement tracking. Auto-discover devices, monitor battery health, track replacements, and receive daily reports.
